prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild arcane library with warm wood textures. Natsu Ironleaf 028, a healer in cream and mint robes, and Natsu Starling, a mage in layered blue robes, stand together. They raise their hands in a synchronized two-person harmless spell practice, glowing soft mana ribbons swirling between them, readable cooperative body motion, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
